allow: Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch --tree-filter 'if [ -f ""NEON-OPTIMIZATION.md"" ]; then sed -i ""s/npg_[A-Za-z0-9]*/REDACTED_PASSWORD/g; s/neondb_owner/REDACTED_USER/g; s/ep-[a-z0-9-]*\\.sa-east-1\\.aws\\.neon\\.tech/REDACTED_HOST.neon.tech/g"" NEON-OPTIMIZATION.md; fi' -f --all)
